title: Chinese Lending Remains Well Above Last Year's Level
section_path: Chinese Lending Remains Well Above Last Year's Level
section_path_text: Chinese Lending Remains Well Above Last Year's Level
summary:
Main
Chinese banks issued 993 billion yuan in new loans in July, which marks a month-on-month decline of 817 billion yuan (-45%) and a year-on-year decline of 67 billion yuan (-6%). Despite the decline, the first seven months of this year have still seen lending grow year-on-year by 22%. In comparison, lending during all of last year grew year-on-year by only 4%.
